strings.EQUIPMENT_BOSSHUNTER_UNCOMMON_PICKUP: Execute a large monster and claim its <style=cIsDamage>trophy</style> <sprite name="QualityUncommon">. Consumed on use.
strings.EQUIPMENT_BOSSHUNTER_UNCOMMON_DESC: <style=cIsDamage>Execute</style> any enemy capable of spawning a <style=cIsDamage>unique reward</style>, and it will drop that <style=cIsDamage>item</style>, with <sprite name="QualityUncommon"> uncommon quality (or <sprite name="Quality"> 1 extra copy of the item, if quality does not exist for it). Equipment is <style=cIsUtility>consumed</style> on use.

Equipment is <style=cIsUtility>consumed</style> on use.
strings.EQUIPMENT_BOSSHUNTER_EPIC_PICKUP: Execute a large monster and claim its <style=cIsDamage>trophy</style> <sprite name="QualityEpic">. Consumed on use.
strings.EQUIPMENT_BOSSHUNTER_EPIC_DESC: <style=cIsDamage>Execute</style> any enemy capable of spawning a <style=cIsDamage>unique reward</style>, and it will drop that <style=cIsDamage>item</style>, with <sprite name="QualityEpic"> epic quality (or <sprite name="Quality"> 3 extra copies of the item, if quality does not exist for it). strings.EQUIPMENT_PASSIVEHEALING_UNCOMMON_PICKUP:
{0}
<sprite name="Quality"> Activate on an ally to teleport it to you and create a ghost in its place.
strings.EQUIPMENT_PASSIVEHEALING_UNCOMMON_DESC:
Gain a Woodsprite follower that heals a friendly target for <style=cIsHealing>10% of their maximum health</style> instantly, then <style=cIsHealing>1.5% of your maximum health</style> every second. Activating the equipment assigns a new target, or yourself if there are no targets available.
Activating the equipment on an ally <style=cIsUtility>teleports</style> it to you, and creates a <style=cIsDamage>ghost</style> in its original place with <style=cIsDamage>200% damage</style> and lasts for <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsUtility>15 seconds</style>. Can have a maximum of <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsUtility>1</style> ghost at a time.

strings.EQUIPMENT_GUMMYCLONE_UNCOMMON_PICKUP: Create a clone <sprite name="QualityUncommon"> of you for 30 seconds that <sprite name="Quality"> inherits some of your items.
strings.EQUIPMENT_GUMMYCLONE_UNCOMMON_DESC:
Spawn a gummy clone <sprite name="QualityUncommon"> that has <style=cIsDamage>300% damage</style> and <style=cIsHealing>300% health</style>. Expires in <style=cIsUtility>30</style> seconds.
The clone inherits the <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsUtility>first stack</style> of all your <sprite name="Quality"> White tier items, up to <sprite name="QualityUncommon"> uncommon quality.

strings.EQUIPMENT_HEALANDREVIVE_EPIC_DESC:
{0}

strings.EQUIPMENT_GATEWAY_UNCOMMON_PICKUP:

{0}

strings.QUALITYEQUIPMENTBARREL_DESCRIPTION: Costs gold to open and will always contain a quality <sprite name="Quality"> equipment item.
strings.QUALITYCHEST2_DESCRIPTION: Pricier, rarer Chest than the Small Quality Chest. Contains an item of at least uncommon rarity and has a higher chance to hold a legendary quality <sprite name="Quality"> item.

strings.QUALITY_CHEST2_STEALTHED_DESCRIPTION: An invisible chest that does not have to be purchased. The Large Cloaked Chest has a chance to contain either an uncommon or legendary quality <sprite name="Quality"> item.

{0}
<sprite name="Quality"> Healing orbs gain an additional buff depending on the skill used.
strings.ITEM_TOOTH_UNCOMMON_DESC:
{0}
Healing orbs gain an additional buff depending on the skill used to kill the enemy. Killing with your <style=cIsUtility>primary skill</style> grants <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsDamage>20%</style> attack speed for <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsUtility>1</style> <style=cStack>(+1 per stack)</style> second(s). Killing with your <style=cIsUtility>secondary skill</style> grants <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsDamage>5%</style> secondary skill damage for <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsUtility>2</style> <style=cStack>(+2 per stack)</style> seconds. Killing with your <style=cIsUtility>utility skill</style> grants <style=cIsHealing>barrier</style> for <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsHealing>15 health</style> <style=cStack>(+15 per stack)</style>. Killing with your <style=cIsUtility>special skill</style> reduces all non-special skill cooldowns by <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsUtility>1</style> <style=cStack>(+1 per stack)</style> second(s).

{0}
Healing orbs gain an additional buff depending on the skill used to kill the enemy. Killing with your <style=cIsUtility>primary skill</style> grants <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsDamage>120%</style> attack speed for <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsUtility>5</style> <style=cStack>(+5 per stack)</style> seconds. Killing with your <style=cIsUtility>secondary skill</style> grants <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsDamage>20%</style> secondary skill damage for <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsUtility>10</style> <style=cStack>(+10 per stack)</style> seconds. Killing with your <style=cIsUtility>utility skill</style> grants <style=cIsHealing>barrier</style> for <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsHealing>50 health</style> <style=cStack>(+50 per stack)</style>. Killing with your <style=cIsUtility>special skill</style> reduces all non-special skill cooldowns by <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsUtility>5</style> <style=cStack>(+5 per stack)</style> seconds.

strings.ITEM_LASERTURBINE_UNCOMMON_DESC: Killing <style=cIsDamage>4</style> enemies in <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsUtility>8 <style=cStack>(+1 per stack)</style> seconds</style> charges the Resonance Disc. Returns to the user, striking all enemies along the way for <style=cIsDamage>300%</style> base damage <style=cStack>(+300% per stack)</style>.

Drones gain <style=cIsDamage>10%</style> chance to fire a <style=cIsDamage>missile</style> on hit, dealing <style=cIsDamage>150%</style> TOTAL damage.

strings.ITEM_DRONEWEAPONS_RARE_DESC:

Drones gain <style=cIsDamage>+25%</style> <style=cStack>(+25% per stack)</style> attack speed and cooldown reduction. 
Drones gain <style=cIsDamage>10%</style> chance to fire a <style=cIsDamage>missile</style> on hit, dealing <style=cIsDamage>150%</style> TOTAL damage. 
Drones gain an <style=cIsDamage>automatic chain gun</style> that deals <style=cIsDamage>6x50%</style> damage, bouncing to <style=cIsDamage>2</style> enemies.

{0}

Interacting with the unit also launches it towards enemies, dealing <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsDamage>800% <style=cStack>(+800% per stack)</style> damage</style> in a <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsUtility>25m <style=cStack>(+25m per stack)</style></style> radius on impact.
strings.ITEM_PHYSICSPROJECTILE_LEGENDARY_PICKUP:
{0}
<sprite name="Quality"> Interact with the Buddy to launch it at enemies.
strings.ITEM_PHYSICSPROJECTILE_LEGENDARY_DESC:
{0}
Interacting with the unit also launches it towards enemies, dealing <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsDamage>1000% <style=cStack>(+1000% per stack)</style> damage</style> in a <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsUtility>35m <style=cStack>(+35m per stack)</style></style> radius on impact.
strings.ITEM_JUMPDAMAGESTRIKE_UNCOMMON_PICKUP:
{0}
<sprite name="Quality"> Increase damage based on movement speed and reduce charge used per jump.
strings.ITEM_JUMPDAMAGESTRIKE_UNCOMMON_DESC: Moving around builds up <style=cIsUtility>charge</style>, granting up to <style=cIsUtility>+160% movement speed</style> and <style=cIsUtility>+200% jump height</style> at 100%. At 25% charge or higher, jumping consumes <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsUtility>75%</style> charge and triggers an <style=cIsDamage>explosive discharge</style> for <style=cIsDamage>400% <style=cStack>(+280% per stack)</style> damage</style>, plus an additional <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsDamage>150% <style=cStack>(+150% per stack)</style> damage</style> for every <style=cIsUtility>100% movement speed</style>, in a 5m to 32.3m <style=cStack>(+7.5m per stack)</style> area.
strings.ITEM_JUMPDAMAGESTRIKE_RARE_PICKUP:
{0}
<sprite name="Quality"> Increase damage based on movement speed and reduce charge used per jump.
strings.ITEM_JUMPDAMAGESTRIKE_RARE_DESC: Moving around builds up <style=cIsUtility>charge</style>, granting up to <style=cIsUtility>+160% movement speed</style> and <style=cIsUtility>+200% jump height</style> at 100%. strings.ITEM_SHOCKNEARBY_UNCOMMON_PICKUP: Shock all nearby enemies every <sprite name="Quality"> 9 seconds.

The Tesla Coil switches off every <sprite name="Quality"> <style=cIsDamage>9 <style=cStack>(-10% per stack)</style> seconds</style>.
